title: synoum glandulosum
intro: Synoum glandulosum, also known as the Indian coral tree or coral tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. It has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin diseases, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and preventing infections. Synoum glandulosum is commonly prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its bark, leaves, and flowers are used in various herbal preparations.
